description: A monochrome point map of Europe, depicting the spatial distribution of an Urban Mask. The map shows dense clusters of black dots representing urban areas, spread across continental Europe, the British Isles, Fennoscandia, and parts of Eastern Europe. The points exclude major linear transportation networks, reflecting the derivation of the mask from the Urban Atlas (UA) Land Use / Land Cover (LULC) 2021 product, specifically targeting urban areas (class 1) while excluding roads and railways. This final urban mask serves as the area of interest for subsequent Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) Small Linear Features (STL) product production. No legend, scale bar, or coordinate reference system information is visible.
